title: centaurea seridis var. maritima
intro: Centaurea seridis var. maritima, also known as the Sea Star Thistle or Maritima, is a subspecies of the Star Thistle plant, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. This plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Centaurea seridis var. maritima include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Centaurea seridis var. maritima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of herbal preparations.
